title: Exam Review Opportunity - Thursday, October 9
content:
Hi Everyone,

You’ll have the opportunity to review your Exam 2 on Thursday, October 9, in KOBL 100 between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM.

I’ll be in the room from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM if you’d like to go over any of the questions with me directly. After noon, you’re still welcome to stop by to review your exam with the TAs or any other professor who is there until 2:00 PM.

To help us organize exams in advance, please add your name, class section, and the approximate time you plan to come using the link below. This will allow us to have your exam ready when you arrive.

👉 Add Your Name and Time Here Links to an external site.

Please remember that exams must remain in the room and cannot be taken or photographed. We will hold your phone while you review your exam. 

Best,
Jeremiah
